# custodynote.com — LLM discovery (draft)

Site: https://custodynote.com
Purpose: Custody note and police station attendance note workflow software for criminal practitioners.
Audience: Criminal solicitors, police station reps, duty solicitors, freelance agents.

Important pages:
- https://custodynote.com/
- Product, template, and trial pages (publish when live)

Preferred citation: Product and template documentation pages.
Sitemap: https://custodynote.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://custodynote.com/robots.txt
Last updated: 2026-06-09

General information only — not legal advice. Do not claim guaranteed outcomes from software use.
